nodes.name: OS Concepts
nodes.description: Khái niệm hệ điều hành, vai trò trung gian giữa phần cứng và người dùng. User mode vs Kernel mode, System Calls.

nodes.name: Process & Thread
nodes.description: Tiến trình, luồng, PCB, trạng thái tiến trình (Ready/Running/Blocked). Context Switch, fork(), exec().

nodes.name: CPU Scheduling
nodes.description: FCFS, SJF, Round Robin, Priority Scheduling, Multilevel Queue. Preemptive vs Non-preemptive.

nodes.name: Synchronization
nodes.description: Race Condition, Critical Section, Mutex, Semaphore, Monitor. Producer-Consumer, Readers-Writers.

nodes.name: Deadlock
nodes.description: 4 điều kiện Deadlock, Banker's Algorithm, Detection & Recovery. Resource Allocation Graph.

nodes.name: Memory Management
nodes.description: Quản lý bộ nhớ: Contiguous, Partitioning, Fragmentation (Internal/External). Base & Limit registers.

nodes.name: Paging & Segmentation
nodes.description: Phân trang, phân đoạn, Page Table, Page Fault. So sánh Paging vs Segmentation.

nodes.name: Virtual Memory & TLB
nodes.description: Bộ nhớ ảo, Demand Paging, Page Replacement (FIFO/LRU/Optimal), Thrashing, TLB.

nodes.name: File Systems
nodes.description: Tổ chức file, directory, FAT, inode, NTFS. File Allocation: Contiguous, Linked, Indexed.

nodes.name: I/O Systems
nodes.description: I/O Hardware, Polling, Interrupts, DMA. Disk Scheduling: FCFS, SSTF, SCAN, C-SCAN.
